headline: FBI рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ THWARTS рҹӣЎпёҸ White House UFC рҹҘҠ SNIPER DRONE рҹ’Ҙ PLOT рҹӨҜ
text: FBI рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ KASH PATEL рҹ•¶пёҸрҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’ј dropped the MIC рҹҺӨ on a WILD рҹӨӘ multi-state OP рҹ”« that was about to GO OFF рҹ’Ҙ at the White House UFC рҹҘҠрҹҘӢ event on the South Lawn рҹҢҝ! Five SUSpects рҹӨЎ arrested across Ohio рҹҢҪ California рҹҢҙ Missouri рҹҗ» Nebraska рҹҗ„ for CONSPIRACY to MURDER рҹ”Ә life in the slammer рҹҡ”! Tycen C Proper 19пёҸвғЈ from Buckeye state arrested first рҹ«Ў mom called COPS рҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ over his GUN рҹ”Ҙ buys and TikTok chats рҹ’¬ with VANGUARD OF THE OLD REPUBLIC рҹҸӣпёҸ ultra-religious ANTI-GOV рҹҳЎ crew! They wanted to JUMPSTART рҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ a REVOLUTION рҹ”Ҙ by sniping HIGH VALUE TARGETS рҹҺҜ like TRUMP рҹҚҠрҹ‘‘ JD VANCE рҹ§”вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ BENJAMIN NETANYAHU рҹҮ®рҹҮұ ELON MUSK рҹҡҖ and other BIG BALLERS рҹ’° at the invite-only UFC throwdown рҹҺү with 4300 inside рҹҸҹпёҸ 85000 watching nearby рҹ‘Җ! Plan was DRONES рҹ’Јрҹӣё loaded with EXPLOSIVES рҹ’Ҙ striking buildings to PANIC рҹҳұ the crowd toward SNIPER TEAMS рҹ”ӯ then SECOND WAVE рҹҢҠ storming WHITE HOUSE gates рҹҡӘ! They mapped рҹ“Қ sniper spots sniper POWER GRIDS вҡЎпёҸ and beefed about GOVERNMENT CORRUPTION рҹҸӣпёҸ EPSTEIN FILES рҹ“ңрҹ’Ұ DATA CENTERS рҹ’§ taking all the WATER рҹҡ° and other shady moves! Alvarez 31пёҸвғЈ directed DRONE пҝҪ flares Proper admitted everything in FBI interview рҹ—ЈпёҸ group started on Tiktok рҹ“ұ March vibes рҹҢҹ! Each faces LIFE рҹ”’ $250k fine рҹ’ё Proper gets extra WHITE HOUSE VIOLENCE charge 5пёҸвғЈ years max! Hearing June 29пёҸвғЈ! FBI Director said attacks STOPPED COLD вқ„пёҸ! No revolution today bby рҹ‘ј!
